jobs.title: Account Executive, Commercial
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><p>Intercom is the AI Customer Service company on a mission to help businesses provide incredible customer experiences. Our AI agent <strong>Fin</strong>, the most advanced AI agent in the market, lets businesses deliver always-on, impeccable customer service and ultimately transform their customers' experiences for the better.</p><p>As an <strong>Account Executive, Commercial<em> </em></strong>, you’ll own the full sales cycle from prospecting through to close for mid-market customers across EMEA. You’ll partner with SDRs and Solutions Engineers to drive period-over-period ARR growth on the Fin AI agent flagship.</p>

jobs.title: Senior Software Engineer, Inbox
jobs.content: <p>Intercom’s <strong>Inbox</strong> team is looking for a Senior Software Engineer to build the conversation-routing surface that powers human agent handoffs from the Fin AI agent. You'll work across Ruby on Rails, React, and Elixir to ship the dashboard experience used by thousands of customer-service teams every day.</p><p>You’ll partner with Product, Design, and the Fin Platform team to drive a roadmap that scales the AI-customer-service flagship to enterprise customers across North America, EMEA, and APAC. The role is hybrid in our Dublin engineering hub.</p>
